common.confirmDeleteDesc: Are you sure you want to delete this?

dashboard.title: Dashboard & Metrics
dashboard.subtitle: Real-time system health and recruitment pipeline monitoring.

assistant.hrDesc: Read recruitment/onboarding data and draft actions. All data writes require HR confirmation.
assistant.employeeDesc: Create and manage your own requests with AI assistance.

attendance.title: Attendance & Allowlist
attendance.subtitle: View and edit attendance records (all changes are logged with reasons). Manage office network allowlist.
attendance.endDateAfterStart: End date must be on or after start date
attendance.networkEmpty: ⚠️ List is empty — all IPs are allowed to clock in. Add CIDRs to restrict to office networks only.
attendance.networkDesc: Only networks in this list are allowed to clock in. All changes are audited.
attendance.networkNoData: No CIDRs yet. Check which IPs traffic is coming from before adding.
attendance.networkReplaceWarning: Warning: this replaces the entire current list.
attendance.networkDeleteWarning: Employees on this network will not be able to check in if this is the only CIDR.
attendance.correctAuditNote: All corrections are audit-logged. Reason is required.
attendance.correctReasonPlaceholder: Forgot to check in due to network issue…

employees.title: Employee List
employees.subtitle: Manage all employee profiles: personal info, departments, positions, and work status.
employees.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete {name} ({code})?
employees.deleteWarning: This will soft-delete the employee. Data is retained but the employee will no longer have system access.
employees.noDepartment: No departments yet. Departments are auto-created when importing employees.
employees.noPosition: No positions yet. Positions are auto-created when importing employees.
employees.documentsDesc: Stored via presigned URLs, access-controlled downloads.
employees.accountDesc: HR creates accounts for employees. Only active employees can receive an account.
employees.accountMustChangePwd: Must change password on first login:
employees.accountNoAccount: Employee does not have a login account yet.
employees.accountInactive: Employee is not active — not eligible for an account.
employees.accountCreatedDesc: Provide this temporary password to the employee (must change on first login):
employees.accountCreatedWarning: Save this now — the temporary password will not be shown again.
employees.createEmployeeSubtitle: Create a new employee profile. Login account will be issued after the employee officially starts.
employees.importSubtitle: Import employee list from Excel file (.xlsx). New departments and positions will be auto-created.

requests.title: Employee Requests (Review queue)
requests.subtitle: Approve or reject employee leave and overtime requests. Rejections require a reason. All decisions are recorded.
requests.bulkRejectDesc: You are about to reject {count} selected requests. The reason will apply to all.

onboarding.title: Onboarding Processes
onboarding.subtitle: Candidate accepted → event candidate_accepted (idempotent) → Employee inactive + checklist. HR completes each task; last task done → process complete + Employee active in one transaction.
onboarding.missingFields: Missing fields to activate Employee: {fields}. Update Employee setup (department/position/manager/start_date) in Phase 2.
onboarding.processDone: ✓ Process complete — Employee is now active (BE transaction).
onboarding.activationHint: Complete all tasks (and Employee setup) to activate the Employee.

recruitment.title: Recruitment
recruitment.inboxDesc: Central inbox for processing recruitment emails and candidate profiles. AI automatically classifies email content; you confirm, split profiles or promote to official candidates.
recruitment.jobAppsCreated: Job Applications created ({count}) — promote to Candidate
recruitment.promoteNameRequired: Applicant name is required for promotion. Edit if missing.
recruitment.candidatesDesc: Recruitment pipeline: new → reviewing → interview scheduled → accepted / rejected / archived. Candidates are not yet official employees.
recruitment.rejectReasonPlaceholder: e.g. Does not match position requirements...
recruitment.acceptedAutoOnboarding: Candidate has been accepted. Onboarding process created automatically.
recruitment.terminalCannotAssign: Candidate is in terminal state — cannot reassign.
recruitment.calendarRequired: Calendar must be selected in Settings/Gmail (GH #214).
recruitment.interviewsDesc: To schedule interviews, select a calendar first. Lifecycle: scheduled → completed / cancelled. When rescheduling, the old slot is kept. If there are calendar conflicts, you need to resolve them manually.
recruitment.calendarCheckError: Cannot check Google Calendar connection — network error or not authorized.
recruitment.calendarCheckErrorHint: You can still use other features. Check Gmail connection in Settings.
recruitment.calendarNotConnected: Google Workspace is not connected or has no calendar. HR needs to connect in Gmail/Settings before creating interviews.
recruitment.calendarPickRequired: Google connected but no calendar selected for interviews. Pick one below.
recruitment.interviewLocked: Interview creation is locked until a calendar is selected above.
recruitment.interviewLifecycle: Interview lifecycle: schedule → scheduled → completed or cancelled. Rescheduling keeps the old slot and creates a new one. Creating or completing interviews does not automatically change candidate status — you need to update manually.
recruitment.jobOpeningsDesc: Lifecycle: draft → open → closed / cancelled. Only open positions accept new candidates. Headcount counts accepted candidates.
recruitment.noPositions: No Positions yet. Create in Employee module (Phase 2).
recruitment.metricsDesc: Recruitment processing statistics for the last 24 hours and status of open positions. Data updates in real-time.
recruitment.metricsNote: Note: processing metrics are for the last 24 hours; job opening metrics are current totals.
recruitment.reviewDesc: CV queue parsed by AI Automation. View confidence/provenance, correct data (correction serves evaluation, not online learning), retry parse or dismiss.
recruitment.correctionHeader: Correction (HR confirms, serves evaluation set — not online learning)
recruitment.confirmCancelInterview: Confirm cancel this interview? This action cannot be undone.

payroll.title: Payslip Management
payroll.subtitle: Create, update, publish, and manage employee payslips.
payroll.netMismatch: Net mismatch: calculated {net}₫ does not match entered {manual}₫. Please correct.
payroll.unpublishConfirmText: Are you sure you want to unpublish this payslip? The employee will no longer see it. You can publish again later.
payroll.deleteConfirmText: Are you sure you want to delete this draft payslip? This action cannot be undone.

knowledgeBase.title: Knowledge Base
knowledgeBase.subtitle: Upload and manage internal documents for HR and Employees.
knowledgeBase.emptyHint: Upload PDF or DOCX to start building your knowledge base.
knowledgeBase.editHint: Editing metadata does not change the file or re-index. It only updates display info.
knowledgeBase.descriptionPlaceholder: e.g. Remote work policy effective July 2026
knowledgeBase.confirmDeleteText: Are you sure you want to delete this document? This action cannot be undone. All chunks, stored files, and metadata will be permanently deleted.

gmail.title: Gmail Channel
gmail.subtitle: Connect your organization's Google Workspace Gmail to receive and process recruitment emails.
gmail.importDesc: Import emails from a date range to process through the AI pipeline.
gmail.draftCreated: Draft email (pending) created. Confirm to send.
gmail.emptyFilterHint: No emails match the current filter — try changing category or syncing.
gmail.emptyInboxHint: Press Sync to load emails from Gmail.
gmail.selectPrompt: Select an email on the left to view details.
gmail.selectHint: AI will automatically classify emails after sync.
gmail.subject: Subject
gmail.composeHint: Email is created in pending state. You need to confirm in the outbound list to actually send (human-in-the-loop).
gmail.outboundHint: lifecycle pending → sending → sent/failed · actual send after HR confirms
gmail.emptyOutboundHint: Press Compose to create a new draft.
gmail.sendConfirm: Send this email for real? This writes real data.
gmail.previewResult: Estimated {count} new emails ({imported} already imported) in {days} days.
gmail.importCancelled: Cancellation requested. Job will stop within seconds.
gmail.importCompleted: Historical import completed. Email list updated.

settings.title: System Settings
settings.policyAccepted: All policies accepted. You can enable AI features now.
settings.presetConservativeDesc: Highest accuracy. Only auto when AI is very certain.
settings.conservativeUse1: Just starting with AI, want to get familiar gradually
settings.conservativeUse3: Few CVs, HR has time to review each profile
settings.balancedUse1: Comfortable with AI, want to optimize processing time
settings.balancedUse2: Medium CV volume (10-50/day), need partial automation
settings.balancedUse3: Mostly common positions, few special requirements
settings.highRecallUse3: HR willing to spend time reviewing more results
settings.aiProviderDesc: Connect to an external AI service to process emails and CVs.
settings.guideStep1: Provider is an external AI service. Supports any OpenAI-compatible API.
settings.guideStep3: Only sends recruitment emails & CVs. No storage, no model training.
settings.policyNotice: You need to accept the data policy before enabling AI features.
settings.policyDescription: When AI is enabled, some data such as recruitment email content and CVs will be sent to the external AI provider for processing. Data is only processed temporarily, not stored or used for model training.
settings.automationLevelDesc: Choose how much AI should auto-process emails and CVs
settings.aiFeaturesDesc: Enable or disable individual AI features
settings.featureEmailClassifyDesc: AI automatically reads incoming emails, classifies applications, and extracts information from attached CVs.
settings.featureAssistantDesc: AI assistant helps HR search recruitment info and draft emails. Always human-reviewed before sending.
settings.toolsDesc: Enable/disable tools that the AI assistant is allowed to use. System only grants read and draft tools, no automatic data writes.
settings.confirmRoleChange: Are you sure you want to {action} user "{name}"?
settings.cannotSelfChange: You cannot change your own role
settings.whitelistDesc: Manage allowed emails and domains for login
settings.emptyWhitelist: List is empty. Add an email or domain to start.
settings.domainsDesc: Manage allowed email domains in the organization
settings.noDomains: No domains yet. Add domains to start.

changePassword.title: Change Password
changePassword.subtitle: You must change your password before continuing.

setup.title: System Setup
setup.step3Desc: Configure your email domain and Gmail integration.
setup.step4Desc: Setup is complete! You can now log in.
setup.backendUnavailable: Backend is not available. Please ensure the server is running.
setup.checkBackend: Cannot reach the backend server. Check that the server is running and try again.
setup.alreadyCompleted: System has already been set up. Redirecting...

employee.dashboardGreeting: Hello {name} — Employee Self-Service. Select an option below to get started.
employee.myProfileDesc: View and update your contact information.
employee.myRequestsDesc: Submit and track leave, overtime requests.
employee.aiAssistantDesc: Read-only assistant for your personal data. Drafts your own requests. You confirm before writing.
employee.noHistory: No attendance history for this month.
employee.checkOutConfirmDesc: Confirm check-out — this action marks the end of today's work day.
employee.attendanceNetworkNote: Attendance is restricted by Network Allowlist (CIDR) configured by HR. If outside the office network, contact HR.
employee.attendanceErrorDesc: An error occurred while loading the attendance page.
employee.attendanceRetryDesc: Cannot display the page. Please try again.
employee.noPayslips: No payslips have been published for you yet.
employee.profileNoAccount: This account is not linked to an employee profile. Please contact HR for assistance.
employee.profileNoEmployee: Login account is not linked to an Employee. Please contact HR.
employee.profileDesc: View your HR profile information. You can update your phone number and contact address.
employee.documentsDesc: Your personal document storage. You can upload profiles, certificates and download when needed.
employee.deleteByHR: Document deletion is handled by HR.
employee.requestsDesc: Submit leave or overtime requests and track their status. Requests need HR approval before taking effect.
employee.dateValidationError: End date must be on or after start date
employee.timeValidationError: End time must be after start time
employee.noRequests: You have not submitted any requests yet.
employee.cancelConfirmDesc: You are cancelling a {type} request pending approval.
employee.cancelReasonHint: Helps HR understand why you are cancelling
employee.cancelReasonPlaceholder: e.g. Changed plans, no longer needed…

errorCodes.NETWORK_ERROR: Network error. Please check your connection and try again.
errorCodes.TIMEOUT: Request timed out. Please try again.
errorCodes.UNKNOWN_ERROR: An unknown error occurred. Please try again.
errorCodes.UNAUTHORIZED: You need to log in to perform this action.
errorCodes.FORBIDDEN: You do not have permission to perform this action.
errorCodes.INTERNAL_ERROR: Server error. Please try again later.
errorCodes.RATE_LIMITED: Too many requests. Please try again later.
errorCodes.AUTH_INVALID_TOKEN: Session is invalid or has expired.
errorCodes.AUTH_SETUP_ALREADY_COMPLETED: System has already been set up.
errorCodes.AUTH_SETUP_REQUIRED: System has not been set up. Please run the setup wizard.
errorCodes.AUTH_PASSWORD_TOO_WEAK: Password must be at least 8 characters with uppercase, lowercase, and numbers.
errorCodes.AUTH_ACCESS_DENIED: Access denied. Please contact your administrator.
errorCodes.AI_AUTOMATION_DISABLED: AI Automation is disabled. Go to AI & System Settings → enable 'Email Classification & CV Extraction' to use this feature.
